name: 骷髅匕首（★） | 虎牙
descriptionEn: This skeletonized-tang knife has been taped at the handle for improved grip. The hole allows a finger to be threaded through for stability and safety. It has been anodized orange and hand-etched in a tiger stripe pattern. Like the tiger it is rare... like the tiger it is deadly...
descriptionZh: 这把镂空的匕首被绑在握把上以提升握感。刀身上的空洞允许手指伸过以提升稳定性与安全性。 这把武器配上虎纹图案进行了橙黄电镀处理和手工蚀刻。 如虎般珍稀… 如虎般致命…
